title: Coordinates Display
description: A Client-Side Mod For Coordinates Display !!
body:
# 🟣 JCords Plus 
## 📌 About

**JCords Plus is a lightweight Fabric mod that adds a customizable on-screen coordinates HUD to Minecraft 1.21.4.**
**It is designed to be clean, simple, and performance-friendly.**

## ✨ Features

- Live X, Y, Z coordinate display

- Custom screen position (corner-based placement)

- Adjustable text color

- In-game configuration screen

- Lightweight & client-side only

## ⚙ Configuration

- Open the config screen in-game

- Change coordinate position

- Modify display color

- Toggle visibility settings

**No manual file editing required.**

## 💬 Commands


```
/cords
```
** - Toggle or manage the coordinates display**

```
/cords help
```
**- To Show All Commands And Features In-Game**

```
/cords toggle
```
**- To Toggle Cords Meter Directly**



# 👤 Credit

**Mod: JCords+**
